exclusions.reason: Ren'Py is not an alpha Japanese-localization opportunity driver: it is over-represented in catalog data by Western/English doujin output and already has high existing translation coverage. Per docs/research/japanese-engine-opportunity-analysis.md it is the easy, already-done reference engine, not a greenfield Japanese driver. It surfaces only as a packed-input detector row and is excluded from the capability breadth.
The unknown-archive-variant row is a non-engine triage bucket, not an engine family, and carries no capability claim.
